# Tollbooth DPYC™

> MCP Monetization for BTC Entrepreneurs. Sound-money commerce without KYC or KYT. Pre-funded Bitcoin Lightning balances at the MCP tool layer.

This file lists DPYC Authorities and Operators registered in the community
registry — MCP servers that AI agents can connect to. Each endpoint follows
the Model Context Protocol over SSE / streamable-HTTP and accepts pre-funded
credit balances paid via Bitcoin Lightning.

## Authorities
- [Lonnie VanZandt](https://dpyc-oracle.fastmcp.app/mcp): DPYC Oracle — community concierge for the Honor Chain
- [Lonnie-Authority](https://tollbooth-authority.fastmcp.app/mcp): DPYC Authority — certificate signing and operator registration

## Operators
- [schwab-mcp](https://schwab-mcp.fastmcp.app/mcp): Charles Schwab brokerage data via MCP with Tollbooth monetization
- [Excalibur MCP](https://excalibur-mcp.fastmcp.app/mcp): Social media posting via MCP with Tollbooth monetization
- [npub1sz60evcudpn...](https://taxsort-mcp.fastmcp.app/mcp): MCP Operator registered under Authority npub1fuhq0clgzhh...
- [Tollbooth Sample](https://tollbooth-sample.fastmcp.app/mcp): MCP Operator registered under Authority npub1fuhq0clgzhh...
- [thebrain-mcp](https://personal-brain.fastmcp.app/mcp): TheBrain knowledge graph access via MCP

## Advocates (community utility services)
- [OAuth2 Authorization Code Collector](https://tollbooth-oauth2-collector.fastmcp.app): Community OAuth2 code storage and retrieval via MCP tools
- [OAuth2 Authorization Code Collector](https://tollbooth--9332e0141cea11f1af0b42dde27851f2.web.val.run): Serverless OAuth2 browser callback — receives GET redirects from OAuth providers
- [Tollbooth Shortlinks](https://tollbooth-shortlinks.fastmcp.app/mcp): Community utility — ephemeral, human-friendly short URLs for OAuth flows and long URLs. 24-hour TTL, no tracking, no interstitials.

## How to connect
Each server in this list speaks MCP. To call a paid tool on any of them:

1. Identify yourself with a Nostr `npub` (public key).
2. Establish ownership via `request_npub_proof` / `receive_npub_proof` — a Nostr DM challenge bound to your application session.
3. Pre-fund a credit balance via `purchase_credits` — pay the returned Lightning invoice.
4. Invoke any tool, passing the `proof_token` from step 2 as the `proof` parameter.

Free tools (`session_status`, `check_balance`, `check_oauth_status`, `check_proof_status`, `request_npub_proof`, `receive_npub_proof`, `purchase_credits`, `check_payment`) never require credits.

## Source
- https://github.com/lonniev/tollbooth-dpyc — the SDK (Apache-2.0, Patent Pending)
- https://github.com/lonniev/dpyc-community — community registry
- https://github.com/lonniev/tollbooth-sample — reference Operator implementation
- https://github.com/lonniev/tollbooth-pricing-studio — iPadOS pricing workbench
